title: OTI — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Office of Technology & Innovation (OTI) object schemas. OTI is the citywide platform operator — it runs NYC Open Data (data.cityofnewyork.us / Socrata), the api.nyc.gov gateway (Azure API Management; GeoClient/GeoSearch), NYC.gov, 311 data, LinkNYC, and the municipal broadband program. These defs reconcile the NYC geography spine carried across virtually every OTI-operated dataset.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across OTI-operated datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

councilDistrict.description: NYC Council district ('Council District' / 'CITY COUNCIL DISTRICT').

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('Neighborhood Tabulation Area (NTA)' / 'NTA').

Agency.description: Owning/publishing city agency ('Agency' / 'Dataset Information: Agency' / 'responsible_agency'). OTI operates the platform on which every agency publishes.

DatasetReference.description: A reference to a NYC Open Data asset by its Socrata four-by-four UID.
